prompt: Horizontal product journey diagram: four calm cards connected by arrows — 填生辰, 读报告, 顾问开场, 事件验证. Soft paper background, blue ink accents, minimal icons of calendar birth form, document report, chat bubble, checklist. Chinese labels only.
title: 从生辰到可执行判断

prompt: Infographic map of reading a fortune report: numbered steps 1 结论 2 时间窗口 3 结构依据 4 风险 5 验证点. Clean layered document illustration, blue accent numbers, paper texture, Chinese UI style.
title: 第一份报告怎么读

prompt: Timeline diagram of life phases (大运) with smaller yearly marks (流年). Soft green zones labeled 有利窗 and amber zones 谨慎窗. Minimal K-line rhythm below. Educational, not fatalistic. Chinese labels.
title: 大运与流年窗口

prompt: Five connected modules in a clean flow: 判断依据, 当前结论, 阶段动作 (今天 7天 30天), 风险提醒, 验证点. Messenger/product UI inspired cards, blue accent, Chinese labels, decision product diagram.
title: 决策闭环：依据→结论→动作→验证

prompt: Abstract educational diagram of Chinese metaphysics structure: center node 日主, supporting nodes 用神, caution nodes 忌神, surrounding five-element cycle lightly drawn. Soft colors, schematic not portrait, Chinese labels, textbook clarity.
title: 日主与用神喜忌（示意）

prompt: Clean mobile chat UI mock: left gray bubble 顾问开场, topic chips, one large blue primary button 一键开口. Linear minimal interface, Chinese UI text, no clutter, product screenshot illustration style.
title: 顾问开场：老师先说，一点即发

prompt: Circular loop diagram with four stations: 记录事件, 到期回访, 应验或偏差, 顾问回聊纠偏. Calm checklist aesthetic, blue and soft green, Chinese labels, product education.
title: 事件验证闭环

prompt: Two-column comparison diagram: left 可做 (结构参考 窗口节奏 可验证动作), right 不做 (恐吓 绝对命运 替代医疗法律投资). Soft warning amber on right, calm blue on left, Chinese labels, ethical product illustration.
title: 判断边界：参考不是定论

prompt: Matrix of small tool cards around a central report document. Arrows from fuzzy question cloud into clear tool cards then into report. Minimal product diagram, Chinese labels 工具 报告 回访.
title: 工具：把大问题拆成可测小问题

prompt: Horizontal set of six minimal advisor cards with Chinese titles 总览老师 事业老师 财务老师 关系老师 时机老师 实践老师, each with one-line duty. Clean Linear list aesthetic, no realistic faces, abstract avatars as simple geometric shapes.
title: 一位老师专一事

prompt: Three-step educational path diagram for a Chinese decision-support app: 1 填写生辰 2 理解真太阳时 3 按顺序读报告. Clean Linear cards, soft paper background, muted ink blue, numbered steps, no superstition imagery.
title: 方法先于结论

prompt: Product timeline: prediction card with time window, calendar mark 到期, three feedback chips 命中 部分 未命中, arrow to chat with advisor. Calm educational diagram, Chinese labels, Linear UI, soft paper.
title: 预测回访：对照现实校准

prompt: Two calm side-by-side profile cards labeled 甲方 乙方, connecting lines for 日主互动 and 用忌互补, center label 对照而非定论. Soft paper, ink blue, geometric, Chinese labels, educational marriage chart comparison not romance stock photo.
title: 合婚：双盘对照

prompt: Clean product benefits diagram with four quiet cards: 完整报告, 窗口详解, 邮箱保存, 预测回访. Not flashy sales, Linear aesthetic, paper background, Chinese labels, membership as research access not destiny guarantee.
title: 会员：完整报告与回看

prompt: Progressive profile ladder diagram: steps 生辰基础, 当前情境, 关键事件, 决策偏好 with progress bar. Minimal Linear forms aesthetic, soft paper, Chinese labels, calm product education.
title: 资料越完整，判断越稳

prompt: Elegant abstract life K-line chart: gentle candlestick-like rhythm over multi-year axis, annotated 大运段落 and 流年波动, soft green favorable windows. Educational finance-chart aesthetic mixed with calm life planning, Chinese labels, no horror fate imagery.
title: 人生K线：节奏而不是宿命

prompt: Clean educational five-elements cycle diagram 木 火 土 金 水 with generation arrows and control dashed arrows. Soft pastel geometric nodes, textbook clarity, Chinese characters, paper background, not mystical altar art.
title: 五行生克（教学示意）

prompt: Messenger-style answer card broken into five numbered sections: 1 判断依据 2 当前结论 3 阶段动作 4 风险提醒 5 验证点. Clean product UI illustration, Chinese text, Linear minimal, soft paper background.
title: 顾问回答五段结构

prompt: Soft amber callout cards labeled 脆弱面 回撤条件 需要验证, beside a calm document. Educational risk framing for decision support, Chinese labels, no horror, Linear product diagram.
title: 风险提醒怎么读

prompt: Three horizontal time boxes labeled 今天 7天 30天 with simple checklist icons inside each. Clean Linear task board aesthetic, Chinese labels, paper background, action-oriented product diagram.

prompt: Circular year-in-review diagram: 回顾时间窗, 对照真实事件, 写下一年动作. Calm calendar and checklist motifs, Chinese labels, soft paper, Linear product education.

prompt: Learning track map with connected nodes: 入门 结构 事业 财富 关系 健康 迁移 应用. Soft geometric path, Chinese labels, Linear education product aesthetic, paper background.

prompt: Three-step knowledge loop: 查术语, 看例子, 回报告对照. Book and document icons minimal, Chinese labels, calm library aesthetic for product, not mystic.

prompt: Diagram with base layer 本盘结构 and overlay layer 城市环境/迁移选项. Two city pins connected by dashed arrow, Chinese labels 结构锚点 环境变量. Educational geo decision support, Linear style, no destiny magic.

prompt: Educational diagram: clock, map longitude line, birth form fields 出生地 钟表时间 真太阳时. Arrows showing correction. Chinese labels, calm science-education style, Linear product, soft paper.

prompt: Four vertical pillar cards labeled 年柱 月柱 日柱 时柱 with 日主 highlighted on day pillar. Clean educational Chinese metaphysics chart, soft paper, ink blue accents, geometric, textbook clarity.

prompt: Horizontal decade grid of life stages 大运 with one cell highlighted 当前大运 and small markers for year changes. Minimal table aesthetic, Chinese labels, educational, soft paper background.

prompt: Three next-step cards after a tool result: 理解主题结论, 生成完整报告, 问顾问老师. Arrows between them, Linear product UI, Chinese labels, calm paper background.
